source_from_po.description: When true, resolves product_id from trigger context's supplier_product_id. When false, uses product_id from config.

product_id.description: Static product UUID. Required when source_from_po is false.

location_strategy.description: How to resolve the destination location. 'po_delivery' uses the PO's delivery_location_id; 'static' uses location_id.

location_id.description: Static location UUID. Required when location_strategy is 'static'.

reference_number.description: Template string for the put-away task reference. Supports {{variable}} substitution from trigger data. Example: 'PO-RCV-{{purchase_order_id}}'
